articles.headline: Marta helps Brazil win thrilling Copa America vs. Colombia
articles.description: Brazil legend Marta led her country to a successful defence of their Women's Copa America title on Saturday, defeating Colombia on penalties after a rollercoaster final.

images.alt: Marta helps Brazil win thrilling Copa America vs. Colombia

articles.headline: Superstar, trailblazer, icon: The legacy of Brazil's Marta
articles.description: Brazil legend Marta has left an indelible mark on the women's game. ESPN spoke to those who know her best to tell the story of her career.
